The Pre-Prelaunch Sequence
Module 3
You only want to sell what the market
wants...
You only want to sell what the market
wants…
• It sounds so simple…
• But you have to know people will buy it
• Not what you think they want
• Or what you think they need
• When you sell what the market wants it makes
things simpler

The Pre-Prelaunch helps you…
• Create a product your market wants
• Refine your offer through a conversation with
your market
• Build buzz for your offer
The Pre-Prelaunch
• The first step in an Internal Launch
Pre-
Prelaunch 	PLC 1 	PLC 2 	PLC 3 	Open
Cart
Prelaunch
The Pre-Prelaunch
• Along with the next Module (Prelaunch Content) –
this is the heart and soul of PLF
• In a later lesson we’ll discuss how to modify this
sequence based on the type of Launch you’re
doing… for example depending on the type of
launch, you may:
• do just one or two things in this sequence (for a
Seed Launch)
• or most of them (for a Joint Venture Launch)
• or somewhere in between (for an Internal Launch)
